Two large red apple trees between the Steak and Shake parking lot and the next strip mall over. Prolific peoduction Access: Public.

Green apple tree LOADED with green apples; lots of low branches but bring a non-pointy grappling hook to try to get some of the high branches to bend down or release their apples. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
